issues.title: Bug: TS0003 (_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp) - Sub-capability Flow cards (Gang 1/2/3) are completely unlinked
Bug report - 4 gang wall switch stopped working

prs.title: Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
Currently, there are no new device fingerprints (FPs) requested in the recent GitHub activity.

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
The following fingerprints are already supported in the Universal Tuya Zigbee integration:

1. **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**
   - Drivers: `switch_3gang`
   - Issue: [Bug: TS0003](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170) - Sub-capability Flow cards are unlinked.

2. **_TZE284_oitavov2**
   - Drivers: `soil_sensor`
   - Issue: [Bug: No Connection possible](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/178).

3. **_TZ3000_xabckq1v**
   - Drivers: `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_2`
   - Issue: [Bug report - 4 gang wall switch stopped working](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1356) (Closed).

4. **_TZ3000_wkai4ga5**
   - Drivers: `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_3`
   - Issue: Same as above.

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
No new fingerprints from forks have been identified for integration at this time.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
Several pull requests (PRs) are currently open or closed that may introduce useful changes:

1. **[Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)** (Closed)
   - User: Robsta86
   - FPs: `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`

2. **[Added TS110E driver](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)** (Open)
   - User: PiTRiS87
   - FPs: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`

3. **[Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)** (Closed)
   - User: chernals
   - FP: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`

4. **[Added 3 new devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)** (Open)
   - User: Peter-Celica
   - FPs: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`

5. **[Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)** (Open)
   - User: Melectro1
   - FP: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`

6. **[Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)** (Open)
   - User: Melectro1
   - FP: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`

7. **[Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)** (Open)
   - User: YuriEstevan
   - FP: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting existing support, issues, and contributions from the community.
